evals.prompt: I want to build a bot for my company. Not sure where to start — maybe LangGraph or CrewAI?
evals.expected_output: Agent posts ~200-word summary, asks save path, writes self-contained handoff report with interview record, functional requirements, state schema, and LangGraph mermaid.

evals.prompt: I need a multi-agent system that researches competitors, drafts a report, and requires my approval before sending email to clients. We have 2 weeks for MVP but it must not send email without me clicking approve.
evals.expected_output: Agent asks ONE question at a time with recommended answers; after sufficient turns posts ~200-word on-screen recommendation, asks for save path, then writes full report with LangGraph mermaid diagram and tooling stack.

evals.prompt: Three specialist agents — researcher, writer, editor — working in sequence on blog posts. No human review, just fast iteration. Small team, Python okay.
evals.expected_output: Agent locks in context, asks ONE question at a time; posts ~200-word recommendation, asks save path, writes full report with CrewAI team structure table and tooling stack.
